client_name.description: Full legal name of the client company.

spec_reference.description: Reference number of the client specification document (Cahier des Charges).
spec_reference.rule: Extract the document reference then append '-' followed by the uploaded file name (without extension). Example: '4CDC1202-NomDuFichier'. If the ref is already in the file name, just use the file name without extension.

document_nature.description: Nature of the document: 'Proposition technique', 'Proposition financière', or 'Proposition technique et financière'.

offer_date.description: Date of the offer in DD/MM/YYYY format. Date of the last update of document.

mission_start_date.description: Start date of the mission in DD/MM/YYYY format.

mission_end_date.description: End date of the mission in DD/MM/YYYY format.

validity_date.description: Proposal validity end date in DD/MM/YYYY format.

validated_by.description: Full name and function of the person who validated the document.

akkodis_entity.description: Akkodis legal entity name used for invoicing.

currency.description: Currency used for invoicing (e.g. EUR, USD).

framework_contract.description: Framework contract (Contrat Cadre) applicable to the mission, if any.

client_contacts.description: List of client contacts, each with firstName, lastName, function, phone, and email.

akkodis_contacts.description: List of Akkodis contacts, each with firstName, lastName, function, phone, and email.

business_segment.description: Selected SAFRAN business segment description (e.g. Calcul éléments finis, Conception mécanique).

nf_code.description: NF code associated with the business segment (e.g. NF127, NF124).

context_overview.description: Description of the client context, their business sector, and the need addressed by this proposal.

main_mission.description: Summary of the main mission to be performed.

location.description: Where the mission will be executed (client site, remote, Akkodis site, or hybrid).

location_address.description: List of addresses where the mission will be executed. A profile can work on multiple sites simultaneously.
location_address.rule: Return an array of strings, one per site address. If only one site, return a single-element array.

service_window.description: Working hours and days for the mission (e.g. lundi-vendredi 7h30-18h00).

logistics_provider.description: Who provides the logistics means: client, Akkodis, or joint.

ppe_required.description: Whether Personal Protective Equipment (EPI) is required.

ppe_details.description: Description of required PPE if applicable.

clearance_details.description: Description of required clearance if applicable.

export_control.description: Whether Export Control constraints are identified for this mission.

gdpr_applicable.description: Whether the mission involves processing personal data (RGPD).

ai_usage.description: Description of AI usage in the project if applicable.

fte_count.description: Estimated number of full-time equivalents (ETP) for the project.

carbon_impact.description: Estimated carbon impact of the project in tCO2eq.

requirements_matrix.description: Compliance matrix: array of objects with chapter_reference, chapter_name, compliance_status (C/PC/NC/NA), and comment.

risks.description: Identified risks: array of objects with risk_nature, mitigation_plan, and comment. Default value: 'En fonction des éléments précisés dans la présente proposition, aucun risque majeur n'a été identifié par Akkodis dans le cadre de cette prestation.' If risks are identified: 'En fonction des éléments précisés dans la présente proposition, des risques sont identifiés, précisés dans le tableau ci-dessous :'
risks.rule: Always default to empty array (no risk). If risks are explicitly mentioned in the document, list them as objects {risk_nature, mitigation_plan, comment}.

pricing_lots.description: Array of pricing lots, each with lot_name, description, nf_code, daily_rate, production_days, unit_count, lot_price, and contract_type.

commercial_discount_percent.description: Commercial discount percentage applied to the total.

total_price_ht.description: Total price excluding tax (HT) in euros after discount.

ancillary_expenses.description: Ancillary expenses object with details, daily_fee, days, and total.

license_fees.description: License fees object with details, daily_fee, usage_days, and total.

billing_frequency.description: Billing frequency (e.g. monthly pro rata of days worked).

payment_terms.description: Payment terms (e.g. 45 jours fin de mois).

order_email.description: Email address for sending purchase orders.

rate_revision_formula.description: Formula used for annual rate revision (SYNTEC index).

client_signatory_name.description: Full name of the client signatory.

akkodis_signatory_name.description: Full name of the Akkodis signatory.

candidate_function.description: Job title or function of the candidate.

proposal_highlights.description: Key strengths of the proposal (experience, expertise, capabilities).

client_manager_name.description: Full name of the Akkodis client account manager (chargé d'affaire).

team_manager_name.description: Full name of the team/project manager responsible for delivery.

external_subcontractors.description: List of external subcontractor entities if applicable.
